name: @cw/desktop
description: CognitiveWorkflow Electron desktop shell (main + preload + renderer)

scripts.build: pnpm run build:ts && pnpm run build:renderer
scripts.test: pnpm run build && node --test dist/main/electron-app.test.js dist/main/electron-runtime-startup-options.test.js dist/main/runtime.test.js dist/main/runtime-command.test.js dist/main/runtime-connection-registry.test.js dist/main/runtime-handoff.test.js dist/main/runtime-ipc-handlers.test.js dist/main/runtime-ipc-main-factory.test.js dist/main/runtime-lifecycle.test.js dist/main/runtime-lock.test.js dist/main/runtime-orchestration.test.js dist/main/runtime-sidecar-stream-smoke.test.js dist/main/runtime-startup-controller.test.js dist/main/security.test.js dist/main/sidecar.test.js dist/preload/contract.test.js dist/renderer/runtime-stream-fetch-event-source.test.js dist/renderer/runtime-workbench-shell-react.test.js dist/shared/runtime-ipc.test.js
